data.body: Investigation complete. ROOT_CAUSE: parse_test_index in pre-commit-test-gate.sh uses exact string matching (not glob expansion) so wildcard .test-index entries (e.g., plugins/dso/scripts/*.sh) never match individual staged files; broad structural tests have no explicit per-file .test-index mappings making them CI-only. Confidence: high. Safe fix: add explicit .test-index entries for 3 agent files to test-agent-standard-reference.sh. Safeguard changes (require user approval): glob support in parse_test_index + local shellcheck hook. Testing_mode: GREEN for .test-index entries.
